<!-- Chart CH-TIM-07 CALENDAR HEATMAP, role-based (themeable) -->

## CALENDAR HEATMAP chart (CH-TIM-07)

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Colors are ROLES, not hex: resolve each role against the active design
language token block (a DL-xx block pasted next to this one). A role
chain like `benchmark -> muted` means use the first role the palette
defines.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-TIM-07",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "pattern",
    "change-over-time",
    "density"
  ],
  "form": "weekday x week grid, shaded and numbered",
  "data_required": "a count or measure per weekday per week; the weekly rhythm is the message",
  "family": "TIM",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-COR-03 (generic two-dimension grids)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "dimensions are not calendar units",
      "use": "CH-COR-03"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- workload rhythm: deliveries, tickets, tests per weekday across weeks
- capacity planning around recurring peaks

Do NOT use when:
- non-calendar dimensions (CH-COR-03)
- single week (a column chart does it)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title naming the rhythm",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "columns": "week labels",
  "rows": "weekday rows {label, values[]}"
}
```

```json
  "canvas": {

  },

    },

      "size": 12,
      "offset": 16
    },

      "size": 11
    }
  },
  "scale": {
    "normalize": "global",
    "note": "one scale across the whole calendar; weekday order fixed Mon-first"
  }
}
```

### Rules
- weekday rows in calendar order, always
- values printed in every cell
- single-hue ramp; global normalization

### Never do this
- sorting weekdays by value
- rainbow ramps
- cells without values

### QA before delivering
- [ ] weekday order fixed
- [ ] every cell numbered
- [ ] title names the rhythm
- [ ] source present

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| background | background |
| cell_low | panel -> background |
| cell_high | primary |
| header | body |
| row_label | ink |
| value | body |
| title | ink |
| source | body |

### Fonts

Title uses the token block's `display` font; everything else uses
`body`. Weight 600 only on highlighted items.
